name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Apple Mail MCP server — 47 tools, reply-as-draft + IDD task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace (shell v2.16.1, binary v2.7.1)。Shell v2.16.1: bump-only to ship binary v2.7.1 (#72 base64 fix + #69 SQLite fast-path stderr logging + #66 .partial.emlx attachment fix);catch-up tool count drift 44→47 in user-facing surfaces。Shell v2.16.0: config schema rename .md → .yaml (#47) — 副檔名 ↔ 內容(YAML)語意一致;auto-migrate silent rename in archive-mail / archive-mail-migrate;legacy .md 仍 fallback 直到 v3.0;IDE 接 yaml-lsp。疊加 v2.15.0 inline cid: 圖片保留路徑 (#45)、v2.14.0 dedup_strategy opt-in (#18)、v2.13.0 markdown template default 簡化 (#17)、v2.12.0 zero-arg mode 從 .claude/.mail/config (#13/#21)、v2.11.0 binary v2.7.0 multi-attachment race fix (#60)、v2.6.0 marathon (8 PRs)、v2.9.0 task enforcement、v2.8.0 namespace、v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation。
